name: bug_inserted_node_no_author_css
description: A node created at runtime by `insert_node` never receives the AUTHOR cascade. The document's stylesheet is cascaded once, at StyledDom::create, and then DROPPED (core/src/styled_dom.rs:1083 — `drop(css)`, a deliberate ~500 KiB memory saving); the XML/mount path routes all of its CSS through exactly that channel (layout/src/xml/mod.rs:218-227), so after the parse nothing holds the rules any more and nobody can re-run the cascade for a new node. The inserted node therefore gets UA defaults + inheritance only: here it carries class 'hot', whose rule paints it red at 80x50 — and it is laid out with neither. NOTE: this is NOT a structural impossibility. The rules ARE retained per node for the Dom-API `.with_css()` path (NodeData.style, core/src/dom.rs:1551); the fix is to keep the cascaded rules (or a compact form of them) on the StyledDom and re-run restyle for inserted nodes — the same 'derived state was never recomputed' family as the stale-screen bug.
